acceptance: node -e "const c = require('fs').readFileSync('assets/css/carousel.css','utf8'); const checks = ['touch-action: pan-y','height: 360px','15rem','carousel-dot','prefers-reduced-motion']; checks.forEach(k => { if (!c.includes(k)) { console.error('MISSING:', k); process.exit(1); } }); if (!/max-width:\s*479px/.test(c)) { console.error('MISSING mobile arrows hide'); process.exit(1); } console.log('OK');"
